cards.name: Task Hub

card_mod.style:
ha-card { background: transparent; border: none; padding: 4px 0 2px 2px; }
.subtitle { font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.07em; color: #60a5fa; font-weight: 500; }

cards.content:
{% set evs = state_attr('sensor.family_next_events', 'events') | default([]) %}{%- for e in evs %}{%- set it = 'T' in (e.start | string) %}{%- set dt = as_local(as_datetime(e.start)) if it else none %}
{{ dt.strftime('%-d %b') if dt else (e.start | string)[5:] }}  {%- if it %}{{ dt.strftime('%H:%M') }}  {%- endif %}{{ e.summary }}
{%- else %}No upcoming events{%- endfor %}
